name: typescript-eslint
purpose: TypeScript-aware ESLint parser, plugin, and flat-config helpers.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view typescript-eslint version license repository.url --json` reported license `MIT` and repository `git+https://github.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: typescript-eslint is the standard TypeScript integration for ESLint.
